## Category

## Product Brief
1. Endpoint protection, firewall, MDR, and XDR platform spanning SMB to enterprise
2. Secureworks Taegis XDR integrated — cloud-native threat detection across endpoint, network, cloud
3. Differentiator: combined Sophos + Secureworks MDR capacity and threat intel after Feb 2025 merger
